_name: Network hyperparameters — small (30 agents, original DNN)

_doc.dnn_hidden_layers: List of hidden layer widths for the feedforward DQN (input→hidden→output).
_doc.grad_clip_value: Max gradient norm for clipping. Applied per-parameter during backprop.
_doc.shared_agent_networks: If true, all agents share one policy/target network (faster, less specialization).
_doc.gnn_enabled: Enable GNN-based observation encoding instead of flat state.
_doc.gnn_conv_type: GNN layer type: gcn | gat | sage | transformer.
_doc.gnn_output_dim: Output embedding dimension from GNN (DNN input when GNN is enabled).
_doc.gnn_observation_mode: replace: GNN embeddings only | augment: GNN + flat obs concatenated.
_doc.gnn_include_interference_edges: Add interference edges to the graph.
_doc.gnn_include_potential_links: Add potential AP–UE link edges to the graph.
